title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how Gemini, an AI tutor, helps developers convert SQL Server database schemas and code to PostgreSQL equivalents. The tutorial shows practical conversions like transforming user-defined types into PostgreSQL DOMAINs while explaining the underlying concepts.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server database schemas and code into PostgreSQL equivalents. It walks through practical conversions, including transforming user-defined types into PostgreSQL DOMAINs, while explaining the underlying concepts. The takeaway is that an AI assistant can both generate the converted code and clarify the reasoning behind schema conversion choices during a database migration.
